title: Welcome to Kleinbyte
excerpt: A quick overview of what Kleinbyte is, what you can do with it, and where to start.

children.text: Kleinbyte is a collection of fast, privacy-friendly online tools for PDFs, documents, images, and more.
Use the PDF tools to merge, split, and compress documents; the image tools to convert and resize; and the developer tools for JSON formatting and SEO helpers.
Browse the tool categories, search for what you need, and check back on the blog for guides and updates.
